body.title: channel_messages: add channel column for real per-channel filtering
body.result: Added channel column (DEFAULT 'shared') + index. 5 INSERT sites updated. MCP channel_read filters by channel. DB migration applied.
body.description: Add a `channel` TEXT column to the channel_messages Postgres table (default 'shared'). Update UC's _channel_append to accept+store channel. Update _api_agent_send and _ws_endpoint to carry channel through. Update igor_mcp _channel_read to filter by channel. Then mcp__igor__channel_read(channel='igor') returns only IGOR-channel messages, enabling the notification routing Akien described (CC notified on SHARED, not IGOR).
